title: 宝塚記念の後に・強えからこそ渇くのよ

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(This race has some stiff competition! They're not
makin' this easy for me...)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I was coastin' fine till today. I really flubbed this
one! Guess I got too cocky...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I won't lose next time... not to anybody!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(You were good, I'll give ya that! Outta everyone,
you were givin' me the hardest time!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(To be honest, I think ya just got unlucky with this
one. But I know ya won't let yourself off that
easy!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ya showed me what it means to thirst for victory!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'll put that lesson to practice, and next year... the
Takarazuka Kinen'll be mine!
